Capability proposal: "Visual Regression Testing with Automated Screenshot Comparison" — A capability that captures screenshots of web UIs or rendered outputs, compares them against baselines, and highlights visual differences with pixel-level precision.. Motivation: Users need to verify UI changes don't introduce visual regressions. Current tools can take screenshots but lack automated comparison. This prevents subtle visual bugs from going undetected during autonomous web interactions.

Capability proposal: "Autonomous Test Failure Root Cause Analysis" — When a test fails, automatically capture the failure context (logs, stack traces, screenshots, state diffs), search for similar failures in memory, and propose a fix with a confidence score.. Motivation: Users currently waste time manually diagnosing test failures. This capability would reduce debugging cycles from minutes to seconds, especially for flaky tests or regression suites.

Autocomplete fix (v5.55+): server returns HTTP 200 with empty results for prefixes shorter than 2 chars instead of 400. Frontend debounce added in v5.56: autocomplete query fires 300ms after user stops typing.

Capability proposal: "Autocomplete Query Optimization" — Intelligent autocomplete query debouncing and prefix length validation that automatically adjusts request timing and minimum character thresholds based on server response patterns.. Motivation: Prevents empty result sets from short prefix queries (v5.55+ behavior) and reduces unnecessary API calls by dynamically adjusting debounce timing (300ms default from v5.56) based on network conditions and user typing speed.
